brand_dna.category: Premium handcrafted, customizable leather golf headcovers made in San Francisco.
brand_dna.core_belief: That a headcover should be built to last and made for you - real craftsmanship a golfer can be proud of on the course.
proof_points: 100% top grain genuine cowhide from tanneries in Italy, Argentina, and Austria
Every piece hand cut and hand-stitched by an artisan in downtown San Francisco, CA
Custom embroidery with initials, logos, or designs
brand_dna.positioning: Premium, heritage-craft end of the golf accessory market - artisan and personalized, not mass-produced.

voice_pillars.name: Artisan Craft
voice_pillars.desc: Leads with the human maker and the handwork behind every piece.
voice_pillars.quote: hand-stitched by a skilled artisan who takes pride in their work

voice_pillars.name: Heritage Elegance
voice_pillars.desc: Speaks to timeless, refined taste and understated luxury.
voice_pillars.quote: heritage style with understated elegance and premium craftsmanship

voice_pillars.name: Built to Last
voice_pillars.desc: Frames quality as long-term protection and durability, not just looks.
voice_pillars.quote: it'll protect your clubs for years to come

voice_pillars.name: Made for You
voice_pillars.desc: Centers personalization and individual expression on the course.
voice_pillars.quote: a look that's unmistakably their own

phrases: I get compliments on them every time I'm on the course
Built to Last, Made for You

icp: Discerning golfers who value craftsmanship and personal style, and will pay a premium for a handmade leather headcover that stands out and lasts.

personas.name: The Statement Golfer
personas.description: Wants gear that turns heads and draws compliments on the course - moved by bold materials, exotic textures, and 'unmistakably their own' designs.

personas.name: The Heritage Traditionalist
personas.description: Appreciates classic, understated elegance and old-world craft - moved by hand-stitched French seams, premium leather, and timeless combinations.

personas.name: The Custom Gifter
personas.description: Buying for themselves or a golfer they love - moved by embroidery with initials or logos and the build-a-set save-10% incentive.

offers: Build a set, save 10% - automatic discount with 4+ headcovers
30-day returns for a full refund or exchange (new, unused condition; custom items excluded)

allowed.claim: 100% top grain genuine cowhide from tanneries in Italy, Argentina, and Austria
Hand cut and hand-stitched by an artisan in San Francisco, CA
Build a set and save 10% with 4+ headcovers
30-day returns in new, unused condition (custom items excluded)

banned.claim: The best golf headcovers in the world / #1 headcovers
banned.why: FTC - unqualified superlative that cannot be substantiated
FTC - guaranteed-results/durability claim not backed by a stated warranty
FTC - invented review counts; only one testimonial is shown on site

banned.claim: Only a few left - order in the next hour
banned.why: FTC - fake urgency not supported by real inventory data
FTC - invented endorsement not present anywhere on the site
